name: Competitor Price Drop + Inventory Surplus
description: Market pressure meets overstock — margin and capacity crisis

input_signals.content: Intelligence: Competitor TechMart cut electronics prices 20% this week. Three of our core SKUs now priced 25% higher than theirs.
Warehouse: Karachi facility at 94% capacity. Electronics at 60 days stock vs 30-day target. Accessories risk expiry in 45 days.
